//: Roo HQ — Realtime Database security rules. Paste these into Firebase Console → Realtime Database → Rules → Publish.
//2: Reads/writes are allowed only under a household whose code is at least 8 characters, so a long, private code keeps the plan to the two of you. The data is just chore assignments (no personal data), so this is appropriate for a family app.
//3: Want it stricter? Turn on Anonymous Auth in Firebase and change the conditions to: "auth != null && $code.length >= 8".
